Generous capacity with a convenient large opening, soft-grain leather outlines stylish and minimalist lines. This practical accessory blends simple yet exquisite details, a vivid expression of the brand's master craftsmanship. Adorned with sparkling metal hardware and an elegant letter logo, highlighting the bag's refined and minimalist beauty. Grab yours now🎉🎉 Dimensions: L40 x H29 x W20cm🎉🎉🎉👏!
